recommendations.title: The Crush
recommendations.overview: A precocious and obsessive teenager develops a crush on a naive writer with harrowing consequences.

recommendations.title: South Park: Bigger, Longer & Uncut

recommendations.title: Drive Me Crazy
recommendations.overview: Nicole and Chase live next door to each other but are worlds apart. However, they plot a scheme to date each other in order to attract the interest and jealousy of their respective romantic prey. But in the mist of planning a gala centennial celebrat

recommendations.title: The Upside
recommendations.overview: Phillip is a wealthy quadriplegic who needs a caretaker to help him with his day-to-day routine in his New York penthouse. He decides to hire Dell, a struggling parolee who's trying to reconnect with his ex and his young son. Despite coming from two

recommendations.title: Make Me Believe
recommendations.overview: Two meddling grannies trick their adult grandkids into a meet-cute that reignites a childhood crush and old grudges.

recommendations.title: Sabrina
recommendations.overview: After her return from school in Paris, a playboy finally takes notice of his family's chauffeur's daughter Sabrina, who's long had a crush on him, but he questions his more serious brother's motives when he warns against getting involved with her.

recommendations.title: Puppy Love

recommendations.title: Lady in the Lake
recommendations.overview: Private eye Phillip Marlowe wants to get out of the detective racket and into crime writing. But when he's called to the office of editor Adrienne Fromsett, it's not to talk about his story ideas — she wants him to locate the missing wife of her boss

recommendations.title: Kill 'em All 2
recommendations.overview: Phillip and Suzanne are retired from the spy game, living peacefully off the grid. That's until their whereabouts are discovered by Vlad, the vengeful brother of their target from the first film.

recommendations.title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dreaming Girl
recommendations.overview: In Fujisawa, Sakuta Azusagawa is in his second year of high school. Blissful days with his girlfriend and upperclassman, Mai Sakurajima, are interrupted by the appearance of his first crush, Shoko Makinohara.
